<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; use Predis\Command\Traits\Keys; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/zdiffstore/ * * Computes the difference between the first and all successive input sorted sets * and stores the result in destination. The total number of input keys is specified by numkeys. * * Keys that do not exist are considered to be empty sets. * * If destination already exists, it is overwritten. */ class ZDIFFSTORE extends RedisCommand { use Keys { Keys::setArguments as setKeys; } public static $keysArgumentPositionOffset = 1; public function getId() { return 'ZDIFFSTORE'; } }
